ResizeVolume.newCdsSizeInGB: New capacity of the CDS disk after expansion, must be an integer greater than the current CDS capacity, unit: GB, valid range: 1–32765 GB.
ResizeVolume.newExtraIO: Adjusted extra IOPS after modification, supports both upgrade and downgrade; newVolumeType, newCdsSizeInGB, and newExtraIO cannot all be empty simultaneously.
ResizeVolume.newVolumeType: CDS supports upgrading and downgrading prepaid and postpaid cloud disks; newVolumeType and newCdsSizeInGB cannot both be empty simultaneously.
